opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My fingers suddenly went completely dead and white in the cold, and now they are throbbing with an agonizing, burning pain as they turn bright red.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden, frightening colour change and severe throbbing pain in the fingers of both hands after going out in the cold about an hour ago.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about an hour ago after going outside to get the mail in the cold evening air
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour so far, now in the painful red phase
symptom_narrative.character: the fingers first went numb and white ('dead fingers'), then blue, and now they are bright red, throbbing and burning
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonizing, burning, throbbing pain now that the colour is coming back
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on in a sequence - white, then blue, then red - and comes on with cold
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: the cold brought it on; it also seems to happen with stress
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: numbness and a 'dead finger' feeling while they were white; intense pins-and-needles and pain as the colour returns
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has noticed the fingers changing colour in the cold before, but never this painful
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: can't use the hands for fine tasks right now because of the throbbing pain

past_medical_history.how_managed: recently started a new daily tablet from the GP to prevent the migraines

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a new daily tablet started recently to prevent migraines - one tablet daily; not sure of the name

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the house is quite cold and the patient was not dressed warmly enough for the temperature outside

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: frightened by the sudden dramatic colour change in the hands and wants reassurance the fingers are not going to be lost

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the colour sequence and the pain vividly and anxiously

objective_data_offered.value: fingers of both hands are bright red and warm to touch now, after being white then blue earlier; no black areas or sores
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video description; perfusion, pulses and viability need clinician assessment
